last_result: FME v2 offline redesign is implemented at commit 5db1d74. The controller now enforces a one-action transfer cooldown, reacts to recent invalid generation with m1 repair, and records replayable controller state. A new development profile measures paired random-versus-alternating-extremes order sensitivity, and the clean fme_unseen_v2 suite uses separate seed ranges and remains lazily generated after candidate freeze. A six-run paired proposal is frozen with max_runs=0, require_confirm_for_real_run=true, launch_authorized=false, and zero additional LLM runs scheduled.
